_README: HOW TO EDIT: Each entry under 'cases' is one test. Set 'predicted_accuracy_subtype' to what the AI judge answered and 'gold_accuracy_subtype' to the correct answer from the dataset. This evaluator ONLY cares whether each side reports an error at all: a subtype of 'none' means NO error, anything else means there IS an error. Set 'expected_score' to 1 if both sides agree on error-vs-no-error, or 0 if they disagree. Valid subtypes (from docs/datasets/Czech): none, mistranslation, omission, addition, untranslated. Use null to simulate a missing/blank value. 'id', 'source' and 'target' are optional context. Add or remove entries freely - no Python editing needed. 'name' is just a label shown in the test report.

cases.name: both say none -> agree there is no error -> match
both report an error (same subtype) -> match
both report an error (different subtype still counts as error) -> match
judge missed the error: predicted none but gold has an error
judge invented an error: predicted error but gold is none
different letter case: NONE still means no error
